title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Finolex Cables

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Finolex Cables
jsonLd.description:
We at Finolex Cables are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Aurangabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Finolex Cables:
Finolex Cables is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Finolex Cables!
